intro: Motes of soft light drift between the crystals, and a gentle presence makes itself felt. A fairy regards your team kindly and offers a blessing of fortune, freely given.
title: The Fairy's Boon
description: A benevolent fairy offers your team a fleeting blessing of luck. Accept it for a surge of fortune over the next several waves, or politely decline.

1.label: Accept the blessing
1.tooltip: (+) A temporary surge of party luck for the next several waves
1.selected: The fairy's light settles over your team, and fortune begins to favor you...

2.label: Decline politely
2.selected: You bow your thanks and leave the blessing untaken.

blessed: Fortune smiles on your team! Your luck is raised by {{luck}} for the next {{waves}} waves.
